creator: tom@FreeBSD.org
text:
> Added my site to http://www.freebsd.org/projects/newbies.html and
> corrected an english errata (organisation --> organization)

Hi,

As a native English speaker, I don't see anything wrong with
"organisation". "Organization" is the American spelling.

This raises an interesting problem: Should the FreeBSD Documentation
Project use American or English spelling, or should we treat both
variations as interchangeable?

Regards,
Tom
